admin.about.card_subtitle: Title and HTML body for each supported language.
admin.about.form_subtitle: Public URL: /about — edit both languages below; visitors see the version matching their language.
admin.about.translations_help: The site shows English or Vietnamese according to the visitor's selected language (with fallback if one locale is incomplete).
admin.about.url_fixed_help: The public URL for this page is always /about.
admin.guide.subtitle: How to use the control panel. This page reads docs/HUONG_DAN_ADMIN.md from the project.
admin.guide.title: Admin guide
admin.media.library_intro: Images only — reuse thumbnails and visuals anywhere on the site.
admin.media.picker_subtitle: Search and pick existing images from your library.
admin.media.upload_drag_hint: Drag and drop images here or browse your files.
admin.media.upload_formats_hint: Max 2 MB per file. JPG, PNG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP.
admin.media_picker.upload_hint: Files are saved to the media library first, then you can use them like any other item (single-select picks the first file and applies it). JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF — max 2 MB per file.
admin.posts.form_create_subtitle: Category, thumbnail image, and HTML body.
admin.posts.form_edit_subtitle: Update category, thumbnail image, and HTML body.
admin.profile.change_password_hint: Leave password blank to keep your current password.
admin.profile.subtitle: Update your name, email, and password.
admin.service_pages.card_subtitle: Title and HTML body for each supported language.
admin.service_pages.form_subtitle: Public URL: :path — edit both languages below; visitors see the version matching their language.
admin.service_pages.path_fixed_help: The public URL for this page is always :path.
admin.settings.home_why.help: Leave a field empty to use the default copy from language files for that locale.
admin.settings.testimonial_image_url_hel: Paste a URL or choose an image from the media library.
admin.settings.testimonials.english_only: Visitors always see this block in English, regardless of site language.
admin.settings.testimonials.help: Three testimonial cards on the homepage. Text is stored in English only (shown to all visitors).
admin.settings.translation_fallback_help: Leave a field empty to use the default text from translations.
admin.status_toggle.no_toggle_own_accoun: You cannot change your own active status from this list. Ask another administrator.
admin.status_toggle.post_hint: Turn on to publish this post on the blog; turn off to hide it.
admin.status_toggle.title: Turn on to show this item on the public site; turn off to hide it.
admin.status_toggle.user_hint: Turn on so this person can sign in; turn off to block access.
admin.tour_form.description_hint: Shown in the hero (short excerpt) and in the Overview section (full text).
admin.tour_form.duration_from_itinerary: Tour length (days) is set automatically from the number of itinerary steps (minimum 1).
admin.tour_form.gallery_help: Image URL, YouTube link (watch, embed, Shorts, youtu.be), or pick from the library. Order matches the public carousel after the thumbnail. Use + to add another item.
admin.tour_form.itinerary_hint: Order of blocks = day 1, day 2, … Rows without a title are ignored when saving.
admin.tour_form.slug_auto: The URL slug is generated automatically from the title.
admin.tour_form.thumbnail_help: Paste a direct image URL and/or pick an image below. If you select from the library, that image takes priority over the URL field.
admin.users.create_subtitle: Invite a teammate to the admin panel.
admin.users.help_is_admin: Administrators can create and manage staff accounts. Editors can sign in but cannot manage users.
admin.users.password_optional_hint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
admin.users.status_hint_list: Change whether this account can sign in using the Status dropdown on the users list.
auth.failed: These credentials do not match our records.

home.testimonials.quote_1: Airport pickup was on time and our guide’s English was easy to follow. Ha Long looked better than the photos; the old-quarter room was small but clean, as they’d described by email.
home.testimonials.quote_2: Booked a 3-day Mekong trip online and got a reply the same day. The local restaurants were a highlight; heavy rain one afternoon meant a shorter boat ride than planned.
home.testimonials.quote_3: We had young kids and worried about a packed schedule, but lunch breaks were sensible and we didn’t start too early. Thanks for moving the kayak slot when our child was unwell on day three.
home.testimonials.scene_alt_1: Travel photo: Ha Long Bay limestone karsts and sea, Vietnam.
home.testimonials.scene_alt_2: Travel photo: boats on a tropical river.
home.testimonials.scene_alt_3: Travel photo: turquoise sea and palm-fringed shore.
home.testimonials.subtitle: What travelers have said after their trip with us.
